$doc: COMMITTED reference roster for the review council. It is NOT the runtime config: at setup, the installer resolves each provider role to its CURRENT flagship model slug and the transport chosen for this machine, then writes local/seats.<host>.json (gitignored). Model slugs are NEVER committed here — recipes use the {MODEL} placeholder so this file never goes stale. {EFFORT} = efforts.default below the critical tier, efforts.max at critical. {PROMPT_TEXT} = the review prompt content (arg transport); stdin transport omits it and pipes the prompt file.

roster.modelGuidance: The Anthropic OPUS line specifically. Use the `opus` alias (tracks the latest Opus) or a concrete claude-opus-* id. NEVER Fable or Mythos (the Claude-5 / Mythos-class line) — setup must confirm the resolved slug is an Opus id.
roster.recursionDisable: --safe-mode (mechanically disables CLAUDE.md, skills, plugins, hooks, MCP)

asExternalCursor.note: Opus-line model via Cursor when the claude CLI is absent (confirm the Cursor slug is an Opus id with `cursor-agent --list-models`). Isolation = read-only `--mode plan` in a clean dir — weaker than native `--safe-mode`; acceptable fallback.

roster.modelGuidance: The latest Codex/GPT flagship. Resolve its transport-specific slug at setup; never commit it.
roster.recursionDisable: isolated neutral CODEX_HOME (empty dir: no hooks.json, skills, or global AGENTS.md) + --sandbox read-only

asNative.note: native pass uses the host's own configured model (no -m); it IS the host's model by definition

asExternalCursor.note: GPT/OpenAI model via Cursor when the codex CLI is absent (confirm the Cursor slug with `cursor-agent --list-models`). Isolation = read-only `--mode plan` in a clean dir instead of an isolated CODEX_HOME.

roster.modelGuidance: Latest GLM via OpenRouter for the opencode transport, or the Cursor GLM slug (confirm with `cursor-agent --list-models`) for the cursor transport. Resolve at setup; never commit it.
roster.recursionDisable: opencode --agent plan (read-only) + clean config dir; or cursor-agent --mode plan (read-only) in a clean dir. Neither loads CLAUDE.md-style council mandates.

asExternalCursor.note: GLM via Cursor when opencode is absent — only if `cursor-agent --list-models` lists a GLM slug; {MODEL} is the Cursor slug, not the OpenRouter one.

roster.modelGuidance: Latest Gemini flagship via OpenRouter, or the Cursor Gemini slug (confirm with `cursor-agent --list-models`) for the cursor transport. Native Gemini-CLI plan mode is experimental, so OpenCode+OpenRouter (or Cursor) is the firm route. Resolve at setup; never commit it.
roster.recursionDisable: opencode --agent plan (read-only) + clean config dir; or cursor-agent --mode plan (read-only) in a clean dir

asExternalCursor.note: Gemini via Cursor when opencode is absent — only if `cursor-agent --list-models` lists a Gemini slug; {MODEL} is the Cursor slug, not the OpenRouter one.

roster.modelGuidance: Latest Grok flagship in Cursor or via OpenRouter. For cursor-agent, confirm the exact slug with `cursor-agent --list-models`. Resolve at setup; never commit it.
roster.recursionDisable: cursor-agent --mode plan (read-only) in a clean project dir; or opencode --agent plan via OpenRouter

$runtimeSchema.$doc: Shape of the machine-local local/seats.<host>.json the installer writes and the council skill reads. `native` describes how THIS host runs its own-model read-only review pass; `seats` are the EXTERNAL seats = roster minus this host's own provider, strongest-first, with {MODEL} already resolved to a concrete slug.
$runtimeSchema.adapter: optional external-seat adapter; cursor requires cursor-json after an output-contract smoke test
$runtimeSchema.responsePath: cursor-json external seat only: dotted JSON string field containing reviewer text
